title: Crash in query with FILTER clause on normal aggregate that refers to a column of a subquery
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE products (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), price FLOAT, quantity INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO products (name, price, quantity) VALUES ('Widget', 19.99, 10);
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM (SELECT id, (price * quantity) AS total_price FROM products WHERE (price * quantity) > 100);
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT PRIMARY KEY, product_id INT, order_date DATE, FOREIGN KEY(product_id) REFERENCES products(id));
key_bug_features: FILTER clause on normal aggregate with subquery column
